items.subject: Technology
items.stem: Which statement about the design process is supported by observation?

options.label: A
options.text: The measurement changed when the conditions changed.

options.label: B
options.text: Results can be guessed without apparatus.

options.label: C
options.text: Evidence is optional in an investigation.

options.label: D
options.text: A hypothesis cannot be tested.

items.explanation: Observations should match measured evidence. Read the question carefully, rule out answers that do not fit the facts, and choose the option that matches what you worked out.

distractor_rationale.B: This option shows a common error with scientific observation.
distractor_rationale.C: This option shows a common error with scientific observation.
distractor_rationale.D: This option shows a common error with scientific observation.
